calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2542.

Michael P. Singsen, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Thomas Wong, dba Auto Rescue.
Mr. Wong was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Rosario Excobar, dba Charles Towing Service.
Default was entered against defendant was filed on October 9, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Progressive Insurance Co., a corp., was filed on May 26, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 9, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Thomas Wong, dba Auto Rescue, and against the Defaulted Defendant Rosario Escobar, dba Charles Towing Service, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $84,503.00.
Costs - $465.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $84,968.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-30-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Jason Gerald Godby present in pro per, was placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Jake Ellis Godby.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
